title: Pulp Fiction
tmdbOverview: A burger-loving hit man, his philosophical partner, a drug-addled gangster's moll and a washed-up boxer converge in this sprawling, comedic crime caper. Their adventures unfurl in three stories that ingeniously trip back and forth in time.
synopsis: Pulp Fiction is a 1994 thriller, crime and comedy film from United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.8 on IMDb. A standout of 1990s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
